error_signature: Pass Programs node does not receive all data
title: Data loss in Pass Programs node from Extract Details
symptom: The Pass Programs node only outputs 326 items instead of the expected 7,621 items from the Extract Details node.
applies_when: Using a loop in the workflow
Data is being passed from Extract Details to Pass Programs
not_this_if: Data is correctly passed in other workflows
root_cause: The Pass Programs node clears its internal buffer at the start of each loop iteration, which causes it to only retain the last output from the loop instead of all outputs from the Extract Details node.
fix_steps: Modify the workflow to ensure data is accumulated across iterations
Use a method to merge or collect all outputs before passing to the Pass Programs node
agent_instruction: Adjust the workflow to accumulate data across loop iterations before passing it to the Pass Programs node.
